focus: Recurring crypto trading, onchain research, portfolio ops, DeFi strategy, and token intelligence loops.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 1 for Crypto / DeFi / Trading. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring crypto trading, onchain research, portfolio ops, DeFi strategy, and token intelligence loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Crypto Airdrop Hunting Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for tracking, qualifying, and executing repeated airdrop participation opportunities across ecosystems.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated crypto airdrop hunting loop workflow inside the crypto / defi / trading wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Crypto Airdrop Hunting Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next crypto airdrop hunting loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Crypto users repeatedly chase fragmented airdrop opportunities with ad hoc spreadsheets and memory.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Crypto users repeatedly chase fragmented airdrop opportunities with ad hoc spreadsheets and memory.

Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: DeFi Yield Rotation Loop
raw_candidates.description: A system for rotating capital across changing DeFi yield opportunities while preserving risk context and timing.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated defi yield rotation loop workflow inside the crypto / defi / trading wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make DeFi Yield Rotation Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next defi yield rotation loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Yield opportunities move quickly, and the cost of slow comparison is materially lost return.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Yield opportunities move quickly, and the cost of slow comparison is materially lost return.

raw_candidates.label: Wallet Ops Security Loop
raw_candidates.description: A recurring workflow for wallet hygiene, permissions review, signer discipline, and onchain safety checks.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated wallet ops security loop workflow inside the crypto / defi / trading wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Wallet Ops Security Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next wallet ops security loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Onchain users repeatedly perform sensitive operational steps that are easy to forget or rush.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Onchain users repeatedly perform sensitive operational steps that are easy to forget or rush.

raw_candidates.label: Onchain Alpha Scan Loop
raw_candidates.description: A loop for scanning new onchain behaviors, wallets, and protocol signals for early opportunity.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated onchain alpha scan loop workflow inside the crypto / defi / trading wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Onchain Alpha Scan Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next onchain alpha scan loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: A lot of perceived edge in crypto comes from interpreting weak signals before they become consensus.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: A lot of perceived edge in crypto comes from interpreting weak signals before they become consensus.

raw_candidates.label: Trade Journal Feedback Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for turning trading history into repeated lessons, bias detection, and next-position discipline.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated trade journal feedback loop workflow inside the crypto / defi / trading wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Trade Journal Feedback Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next trade journal feedback loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Many traders keep records, but far fewer convert them into honest recurring behavioral feedback.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Many traders keep records, but far fewer convert them into honest recurring behavioral feedback.

raw_candidates.label: Portfolio Rebalancing Loop
raw_candidates.description: A system for rebalancing dynamic portfolios across changing conviction, risk, and time horizons.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated portfolio rebalancing loop workflow inside the crypto / defi / trading wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Portfolio Rebalancing Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next portfolio rebalancing loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Rebalancing is recurring but mentally expensive, especially when narratives and prices both move fast.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Rebalancing is recurring but mentally expensive, especially when narratives and prices both move fast.

raw_candidates.label: Crypto Tax Tracking Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for continuously organizing taxable onchain activity before the end-of-year scramble.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated crypto tax tracking loop workflow inside the crypto / defi / trading wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Crypto Tax Tracking Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next crypto tax tracking loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Crypto users know tax complexity is painful, but most postpone cleanup until it becomes much harder.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Crypto users know tax complexity is painful, but most postpone cleanup until it becomes much harder.
